content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Low volatility 25.0% with mixed breadth (3/8 sectors positive); market favors cyclicals but participation is narrow.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Heavy Industry and Construction & REIT are leading: EREGL (1W: +7.73% | 1M: +24.45%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +7.22% | 1M: +45.51%) ABOVE TREND, DOHOL (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +13.87%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Transportation, Technology & Telecom and Banking are lagging: THYAO (1W: -4.71% | 1M: +4.76%) CORRECTION, KONTR (1W: -11.03% | 1M: +20.77%) CORRECTION, AKBNK (1W: -7.63% | 1M: +10.91%) CORRECTION.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
EREGL (1W: +7.73% | 1M: +24.45%) ABOVE TREND; DOHOL (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +13.87%) ABOVE TREND; TKFEN (1W: +7.22% | 1M: +45.51%) ABOVE TREND; KRDMD (1W: +6.53% | 1M: +24.66%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +5.99% | 1M: +31.23%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TRALT (1W: -11.88% | 1M: -1.24%) BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -11.54% | 1M: -0.17%) BELOW TREND; KONTR (1W: -11.03% | 1M: +20.77%) CORRECTION; TAVHL (1W: -9.65% | 1M: -9.50%) BELOW TREND; AKBNK (1W: -7.63% | 1M: +10.91%) CORRECTION.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Upside momentum: EREGL (1W: +7.73% | 1M: +24.45%) ABOVE TREND, DOHOL (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +13.87%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +7.22% | 1M: +45.51%) ABOVE TREND. Downside momentum: TRALT (1W: -11.88% | 1M: -1.24%) BELOW TREND, TRMET (1W: -11.54% | 1M: -0.17%) BELOW TREND, KONTR (1W: -11.03% | 1M: +20.77%) CORRECTION.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking is under pressure after a broad pullback; AKBNK (1W: -7.63% | 1M: +10.91%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -4.02% | 1M: +10.05%) CORRECTION, ISCTR (1W: -3.04% | 1M: +13.53%) CORRECTION — selective value on dips but momentum is negative.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy Industry and Autos lead the market rally: EREGL (1W: +7.73% | 1M: +24.45%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (1W: +6.53% | 1M: +24.66%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +5.99% | 1M: +31.23%) ABOVE TREND; FROTO (1W: -4.20% | 1M: -3.07%) BELOW TREND is a watch for mean reversion.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Mixed: TUPRS (1W: +3.04% | 1M: +4.94%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +3.91% | 1M: +12.63%) ABOVE TREND and SASA (1W: +5.72% | 1M: +34.19%) ABOVE TREND outperform while TRMET (1W: -11.54% | 1M: -0.17%) BELOW TREND and TRALT (1W: -11.88% | 1M: -1.24%) BELOW TREND signal dispersion.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Tilt toward cyclical leaders in Heavy Industry and Construction (overweight EREGL, TKFEN, KRDMD) and selective energy longs (TUPRS, PETKM, SASA); maintain underweight on Transportation, broad Banking positions until technical stabilisation.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TKFEN (1W: +7.22% | 1M: +45.51%) ABOVE TREND for momentum continuation; EREGL (1W: +7.73% | 1M: +24.45%) ABOVE TREND for cyclicals; KONTR (1W: -11.03% | 1M: +20.77%) CORRECTION for volatility-led opportunities; TRALT (1W: -11.88% | 1M: -1.24%) BELOW TREND as a risk event to monitor.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Construction & REIT and Heavy Industry for leadership and continuation; Banking/Transportation for downside risk and potential mean-reversion setups.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 technical supports and short-term moving averages for confirmation of the RISK-ON bias; macro catalysts: CBRT communications, inflation prints, FX moves and corporate earnings/flows will be immediate triggers for sector rotation.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON environment driven by low volatility (25.0%) but narrow breadth (3/8 sectors). Cycle-sensitive Heavy Industry and Construction lead the tape (EREGL, TKFEN, KRDMD); watch banking and transportation for downside risk and selective pullback buying opportunities.
